message:
test(sec53): add 13 incident evidence bundle tests (bd-11mqo)

Validates bundle generation determinism, hash integrity, serde
roundtrip stability, forensic replay with no-redaction policy,
filtering by extension, redaction enforcement, summary count
accuracy, tamper detection, and peak risk/enforcement tracking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
